message:
fix(gui): resolve frankenterm-dynamic dual-name issue for GUI compilation

Replace wezterm-dynamic dep with frankenterm-dynamic and add extern crate
alias so vendored code using wezterm_dynamic:: paths still resolves.
frankenterm-gui now compiles clean (0 errors, 22 warnings).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
